title: WorkflowRun
description: The shape returned by the workflow status/result read tools (get_workflow_status / get_workflow_result) and the CLI `rebar workflow status/result`. One permissive schema covers both: `status` carries the per-step status map; `result` carries the terminal-step output + every step's outputs. `additionalProperties:true` so the evolving run record never breaks the contract; only run_id and status are required.

status.description: running | succeeded | failed (a per-step status uses the same vocabulary plus pending/skipped).

terminal_output.description: The terminal step's output map (the run result); present in the result read.

steps.description: Present in the status read: step_id -> status string.

outputs.description: Present in the result read: step_id -> that step's output map.

truncated.description: True when large outputs were elided to keep the payload under the MCP token budget; read the full result via the library.
